trade.summary: Significant bilateral trade relationship. The Regno Unito exports financial services, pharmaceuticals, and machinery to Svezia. Svezia exports Volvo and Scania vehicles, IKEA goods, paper products, and pharmaceuticals (AstraZeneca) to the Regno Unito. AstraZeneca, though Regno Unito-headquartered, embodies the deep Regno Unito-Svezia business relationship.

diplomatic.summary: Regno Unito-Svezia relations are excellent and have strengthened markedly following Svezia's NATO accession in March 2024. Both countries are strongly pro-Ucraina, aligned on Russia sanctions, and committed to the rules-based international order. The Regno Unito was a key advocate for Svezia's NATO bid. Regno Unito-Svezia bilateral cooperation spans security, trade, and climate.

military.summary: Both NATO allies with strengthening defence cooperation. Regno Unito supported Svezia's NATO accession process. Joint exercises in Northern Europe. Swedish Gripen and Regno Unito Typhoon/Rafale cooperation in NATO air defence. Both countries cooperate on Baltic Sea security and Russia's northern flank. Saab-BAE Systems cooperation on defence systems.

financial.summary: London is a primary financial centre for Swedish companies. AstraZeneca (Svezia-Regno Unito), Ericsson, and other major Swedish companies are deeply integrated with Regno Unito capital markets. Swedish pension funds (AP funds) hold Regno Unito assets. Regno Unito-Svezia fintech cooperation is growing.

energy.summary: Regno Unito-Svezia cooperation in offshore wind (North Sea and Baltic Sea). Svezia's Vattenfall has major Regno Unito offshore wind investments. Both countries committed to clean energy transition. Cooperation in hydrogen and green steel (SSAB-Regno Unito partnerships).

scientific.summary: Exceptional research partnership. AstraZeneca bridges Regno Unito and Swedish pharmaceutical research. Collaboration in life sciences (Karolinska-Oxford-Cambridge links), AI, materials, and climate science. Many Swedish academics work in Regno Unito institutions. Horizon Europe cooperation restored.
